name: Baked Stuffed Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop mushrooms, onion, and green pepper into small pieces.
2. In a saucepan, melt 2 tablespoons of butter over medium heat.
3. Add chopped vegetables, a dash of salt, and pepper to the pan.
4. Cook until the vegetables are tender.
5. Mix in the yolks from the hard boiled eggs.
6. Gradually add enough sauce to the mixture so it holds together without being crumbly.
7. Incorporate 1 cup grated cheddar cheese into the mixture.
8. Halve the eggs and stuff each half with the egg yolk mixture.
9. In a baking dish, arrange the stuffed eggs on top of the sauce.
10. Bake at 325°F (160°C) for 20 to 30 minutes, or until set.
11. Serve with fruit salad, smoked turkey, ham, condiments, and assorted breads and muffins if desired.
Any questions? Please send them to my private box. Lexi in Santa Barbara.
